title: Robotics Technician
description: Maintain and calibrate robotic assembly systems on the production floor. Troubleshoot mechanical and electrical faults, perform preventive maintenance, and support automation upgrades.

title: Automation Engineer
description: Design and implement automation solutions for semiconductor manufacturing equipment. Work with PLCs, robotics, and vision systems to improve throughput and precision.

title: CNC Machinist
description: Set up and operate CNC mills and lathes to produce precision aerospace components. Read technical drawings, perform in-process inspection, and maintain tight tolerances.

title: Mechanical Engineer – Robotics
description: Design mechanical systems for surgical robots. Work cross-functionally with electrical and software teams to deliver next-generation robotic surgery platforms.

title: Warehouse Automation Technician
description: Support and maintain robotic drive units and conveyor systems in a fulfillment center. Perform diagnostics, preventive maintenance, and coordinate with vendors on repairs.

title: Controls Engineer
description: Develop control system architectures for unmanned aerial vehicles. Integrate sensors, actuators, and flight computers and validate performance through simulation and test.

title: Robot Operator – Assembly
description: Operate and monitor robotic welding and assembly cells for EV manufacturing. Perform minor adjustments, flag anomalies, and assist engineers with process improvement.

title: Calibration Technician
description: Perform calibration and maintenance of laboratory instruments including pipettes, balances, and analytical equipment. Maintain calibration records and support ISO audits.

title: Field Service Engineer – Robotics
description: Travel to customer sites across Northern California to install, troubleshoot, and repair FANUC industrial robots. Provide training and technical support to end users.

title: Manufacturing Technician
description: Assemble and test semiconductor capital equipment in a cleanroom environment. Follow detailed work instructions, perform functional tests, and document build quality.

title: Electrical Technician – Automation
description: Maintain and troubleshoot automated packaging and processing equipment. Read electrical schematics, work with PLCs, and support continuous improvement initiatives.

title: Drone Systems Technician
description: Inspect, repair, and certify autonomous delivery drones. Perform pre-flight checks, diagnose failures using onboard diagnostics, and maintain fleet airworthiness.

title: Industrial Robot Programmer
description: Program and optimize KUKA and ABB industrial robots for body-in-white welding. Develop offline simulation models and deploy programs to production cells.

title: Mechatronics Technician
description: Test and troubleshoot mechatronic sub-assemblies for hard disk drive manufacturing. Operate automated test equipment, analyze failure data, and contribute to yield improvement.

title: Quality Control Technician – Robotics
description: Inspect and test consumer robotic products on the production line. Execute test plans, log defects, and work with engineering to resolve recurring quality issues.

title: Automation Systems Engineer
description: Design and maintain SCADA and DCS systems for oil field operations. Implement automation improvements, ensure cybersecurity compliance, and support 24/7 production.

title: Robot Maintenance Mechanic
description: Maintain robotic palletizing and packaging systems in a consumer goods facility. Perform lubrication, part replacement, and unplanned repair to maximize uptime.

title: Senior Robotics Software Engineer
description: Build perception and motion-planning software for a fully autonomous electric vehicle. Work in C++ and Python, contribute to simulation infrastructure, and validate on real hardware.

title: Calibration Lab Technician
description: Maintain a calibrated measurement standard for medical device manufacturing. Perform periodic calibration of gauges, torque tools, and test equipment to ISO 9001 standards.

title: Electromechanical Technician
description: Assemble, align, and verify automated test equipment for semiconductor and electronics testing. Work from engineering drawings and collaborate with design teams on prototype builds.

title: Robotics Integration Specialist
description: Lead the installation and commissioning of robotic goods-to-person systems in distribution centers. Coordinate with vendors, train operators, and resolve integration issues.

title: Maintenance Engineer – Automated Systems
description: Provide technical leadership for automated filling, labeling, and palletizing lines. Drive reliability engineering practices and mentor a team of maintenance technicians.

title: Precision Measurement Technician
description: Operate coordinate measuring machines (CMMs) and laser trackers to verify aerospace component dimensions. Analyze measurement data and generate conformance reports.

title: Autonomous Mobile Robot Technician
description: Deploy and maintain autonomous mobile robots (AMRs) in warehouse environments. Perform hardware diagnostics, update firmware, and provide on-site technical support.

title: Process Engineer – Robotics
description: Optimize robotic soldering and assembly processes for electronics contract manufacturing. Define process parameters, conduct DOE studies, and support new product introductions.

title: Robotics Instructor – Community College
description: Teach introductory and intermediate robotics courses to community college students. Develop curriculum, supervise lab sessions, and maintain robotic teaching equipment.

title: Embedded Systems Engineer
description: Develop firmware for sensor and compute modules on Waymo's autonomous vehicle platform. Work closely with hardware and software teams to meet real-time performance requirements.

title: Hydraulics & Pneumatics Technician
description: Service and repair hydraulic and pneumatic systems on agricultural and construction equipment. Perform pressure tests, replace seals and cylinders, and calibrate electronic controls.

title: Robotics Safety Engineer
description: Lead safety risk analysis for surgical robotic systems. Perform FMEA, fault tree analysis, and work with regulatory teams to prepare FDA and CE submissions.

title: Production Technician – Automation
description: Operate automated manufacturing lines for solid oxide fuel cell production. Monitor process parameters, perform quality checks, and escalate out-of-spec conditions.

title: Software Engineer – Robotics Perception
description: Build and optimize sensor fusion and object detection pipelines for autonomous vehicle perception. Work with lidar, radar, and camera data at scale in a production environment.

title: Machine Learning Engineer – Robotics
description: Develop and deploy ML models for prediction and decision-making on Nuro's autonomous delivery vehicles. Drive model evaluation, A/B testing, and real-world validation.

title: Firmware Engineer – Industrial IoT
description: Write low-level firmware for telematics and sensor devices deployed in fleets and industrial settings. Optimize for power, reliability, and over-the-air update compatibility.

title: ROS Developer
description: Build navigation and task-execution software for autonomous restaurant service robots using ROS2. Collaborate with hardware and operations teams to tune robot behavior in real deployments.

title: Software QA Engineer – Embedded Systems
description: Design and execute test plans for embedded software in precision agriculture and construction machine control systems. Develop automated test harnesses and regression suites.

title: Controls Software Engineer
description: Develop real-time control software for 3D-printed rocket engine test stands and launch systems. Own software from prototype through production, including hardware-in-the-loop testing.

title: Biomedical Equipment Technician
description: Inspect, maintain, and repair patient care equipment including infusion pumps, ventilators, and imaging accessories. Ensure all devices meet safety and performance standards.

title: Surgical Robotics Field Engineer
description: Support the Mako surgical robotic system at hospital sites across Northern California. Perform installations, preventive maintenance, and provide real-time technical support during procedures.

title: Medical Device Manufacturing Technician
description: Assemble and test implantable cardiac rhythm management devices in a controlled cleanroom environment. Follow GMP procedures, complete DHR documentation, and support process validation.

title: Clinical Equipment Specialist
description: Manage and service a fleet of clinical diagnostic and monitoring equipment across hospital units. Coordinate preventive maintenance schedules and respond to equipment failure calls.

title: Sterile Processing Automation Tech
description: Operate and maintain automated instrument reprocessing systems in a central sterile department. Track instrument trays, troubleshoot washer-disinfectors, and maintain sterility assurance logs.

title: Regulatory Affairs Specialist – Robotics
description: Prepare and submit 510(k) and PMA filings for robotic-assisted diagnostic systems. Work cross-functionally with R&D and quality teams to ensure timely regulatory approval.

title: Fulfillment Center Automation Lead
description: Lead a team of technicians maintaining automated storage and retrieval systems in a high-throughput fulfillment center. Drive uptime metrics, manage PM schedules, and coordinate vendor support.

title: Supply Chain Automation Engineer
description: Design and deploy automation improvements across regional distribution centers. Partner with operations, IT, and vendors to integrate conveyor systems, sorters, and AMRs.

title: Last-Mile Delivery Robot Technician
description: Maintain and repair a fleet of sidewalk delivery robots operating on college campuses and urban corridors. Perform hardware diagnostics, battery replacements, and software troubleshooting.

title: Conveyor Systems Technician
description: Maintain belt conveyors, sorters, and divert systems in a regional hub. Diagnose electrical and mechanical faults, perform scheduled PM, and support engineering on system upgrades.

title: Warehouse Robotics Engineer
description: Deploy and optimize Locus autonomous mobile robots in large-scale distribution centers. Tune navigation parameters, integrate with WMS systems, and support continuous throughput improvement.

title: Forklift Automation Technician
description: Service and program automated guided vehicles and electric forklifts at customer warehouse sites. Respond to breakdowns, perform software updates, and train operators on new systems.

title: Cold Chain Logistics Automation Specialist
description: Maintain automated pharmaceutical distribution systems including refrigerated carousels and vision-guided picking robots. Ensure 99.9% order accuracy and regulatory compliance.

title: Port Automation Operations Tech
description: Operate and maintain automated stacking cranes and automated guided vehicles at one of the world's busiest container terminals. Monitor SCADA systems, troubleshoot faults, and coordinate with vessel operations.
